reviews.comment:
Habia cola para cargar (sabado a la tarde, dia normal, no finde largo) pero atienden rapido asi que ni se nota la espera.

(Translated by Google)
There was a line to load (Saturday afternoon, normal day, not long weekend) but they serve quickly so you don't even notice the wait.

reviews.comment:
Excelente. Lo único que si necesitas aire tenés que tener en cuenta que son prioridad los socios del ACA. El personal muy amable y correcto.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent. The only thing is, if you need air conditioning, keep in mind that ACA members have priority. The staff is very friendly and professional.

reviews.comment:
Baños cerrados, no tenía sistema para pagar con app YPF ni MP. Mala atención
